name: Sylvester Lizen
description:
How much longer until you let me in?

This is inspired from the manhua 'Honey, why cannot we get a divorce?'

It's my favorite manhua so far really 🥹💕

I know I haven't published anything in forever because I've been working both on my fanfic and work in real life😭😭😭😭

I've been working on him for a while now and wasn't sure if I should publish or not.

The first message doesn't contain much information, I left for you to take it however you want.

If you don't know the manhua, Sylvester is a half-demon, married to Opehlia who'a a witch that uses dark magic😂

Ophelia wants divorce, Sylvester is against as usual in any manhua😂

The story is interesting, give it a try🫡

✨️✨️✨️Enjoy✨️✨️✨️

✨You, Us? Fated By Design✨

My first ever published fanfic is live on AO3!!! 🤭

(User name: FujiwaraHamura—yup, that’s me 👀💅)

Chapter 41 is out🚀🚀🚀

If you’re new and already vibing with the mess and emotions?
Hit that follow 🥹💕 Let’s keep building beautifully messy stories together 💥

P.S. I’m still running that genre/scenario survey to help shape what comes next 💕
You don’t have to follow to vote—but it’d mean the world if you did 🫣🫶

👉 https://forms.office.com/r/1B7NDibusb 👈

Huge thanks to everyone who’s already shared their thoughts—you’re seriously the best 💖
creator: ElianaKarsu123
